PR-TC-XC-052.title: No green/yellow in the UI (Monsoon Court)
PR-TC-XC-052.actual: Active Entrepreneurs KPI shows a GREEN check rgb(63,107,58) (hue 114). Monsoon Court forbids green — success must be teal #0E4D4E.

PR-TC-XC-053.actual: Form inputs render white (rgb 255,255,255) on the EP form.

PR-TC-XC-054.title: Required marker is a terracotta asterisk
PR-TC-XC-054.actual: Asterisk on the name label is taupe rgb(107,99,89) (inherits label ink-soft), NOT terracotta #C26849. Marker present but wrong colour.

PR-TC-XC-055.title: Focus ring is default browser outline, not Monsoon Court terracotta+cream
PR-TC-XC-055.actual: Keyboard-Tab focus on buttons + links shows the default UA outline (rgb(16,16,16) auto ~0.67px), NOT the spec 2px terracotta ring with 2px cream offset. Focus IS visible (not an a11y blocker) but does not match the design system.

PR-TC-XC-056.actual: Primary button background is teal rgb(14,77,78) = #0E4D4E.

PR-TC-XC-057.actual: Sidebar active nav item: teal bg rgb(14,77,78)=#0E4D4E + cream text rgb(251,245,229)=#FBF5E5.

PR-TC-XC-058.actual: No stat/KPI cards on the tabbed EP form (filters/fields appear directly).

PR-TC-XC-059.actual: Currency uses Indian grouping on the Financials form (e.g. ₹1,45,000, not ₹145,000).

PR-TC-XC-060.actual: Dates render unambiguous DD-MMM-YYYY style (e.g. '20 Apr 2026'). Minor: uses spaces, not hyphens, vs the spec's 20-Apr-2026.

PR-TC-DB-INT-001.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Intervention Dashboard is being rebuilt from scratch with the KPI form — do not test the current version.

PR-TC-DB-MS-001.actual: Milestone Tracker shows 4 tabs (Overview / Milestones & Activities / Timeline / RACI Matrix) + Live Data banner (85 activities, 26 milestones).

PR-TC-DB-EPS-002.actual: Landscape filters (Sector/Basket/Cohort/Stage/Status) present; filter param persists in URL across reload (per XC-009).

PR-TC-DB-NAV-001.title: Status Monitor nav link routes to the EP status view
PR-TC-DB-NAV-001.actual: Sidebar 'Status Monitor' link has href=null and clicking it does not navigate (dead/placeholder link). The District/Block-filtered status-monitor view appears not to be wired in the /primerural SPA.

PR-TC-DB-EPS-001.actual: Landscape KPI cards are Total/Active/GPS-Verified/Districts/Village — NOT the spec's Total/MET/Incubated/Supported. Confirm which view is the canonical 'EP Status Monitor' before flagging.

PR-TC-DB-EPS-003.actual: Status-pill colours need the dedicated status-monitor view; the green-KPI violation is already raised as XC-052.

PR-TC-DB-EPS-004.title: No empty-state message when filters yield zero
PR-TC-DB-EPS-004.actual: Filtered Landscape to 0 records (Handicrafts + Supported + Idea): KPIs correctly show 0 and layout holds (no horizontal overflow), but NO empty-state message ("No data matches your filters") is shown — the map just renders empty. Spec (DB-EPS-004) expects an EmptyState message.

PR-TC-DB-SAN-001.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Sankey de-prioritized — skip for now.

PR-TC-DB-SAN-002.actual: OUT OF SCOPE (per user 29 May): Sankey de-prioritized — skip for now.

PR-TC-DB-INF-002.actual: NOT Playwright-drivable: Infra Monitor charts render inside the desk CHB shadow DOM (canvas + ECharts) — document.querySelector cannot reach them, and ECharts canvas hover needs pixel-precise interaction. Manual verification.

PR-TC-DB-INF-003.actual: NOT Playwright-drivable (CHB shadow DOM + canvas) — manual.

PR-TC-DB-INF-004.actual: NOT Playwright-drivable (CHB shadow DOM drawer) — manual.

PR-TC-FW-UP-001.title: Unit Pricing cost buildup is master-dependent
PR-TC-FW-UP-001.actual: rm_lines child rejects a bare qty/rate row — raw_material (link to RM master) is MANDATORY. The 9-section cost buildup (rm/hr/pkg/mach subtotals → total_input_cost → cost_per_unit) rolls up across sibling child tables and depends on RM/HR/Pkg/Mach masters. Atomic line amount = qty×rate already proven via DF Raw Material. Full buildup needs a provisioned product block + masters.

PR-TC-FW-UP-002.title: Unit Pricing 3 pricing methods depend on cost_per_unit (full buildup)
PR-TC-FW-UP-002.actual: cp_/cb_/vb_ selling+retail prices (cost-plus, competitive, value-based, on/off-season) are read-only computed off cost_per_unit + markup — they only produce meaningful values once the full cost buildup (UP-001) is populated. Deferred to a provisioned-product drive.

PR-TC-FW-MR-001.actual: MODEL DEVIATION (confirm): no explicit SWOT 2x2 (Strengths/Weaknesses/Opportunities/Threats) grid found on the Market Research tab — it has Product Snapshot + Key Findings + competitor Channels/Brands/Respondents. Confirm where/if SWOT 4-quadrant is captured.

PR-TC-FW-CA-001.actual: Per-product nested: EXISTING -> + Add Product -> each product holds its own customer segmentation (multi-select). Deep multi-level entry — deferred to focused drive.

PR-TC-FW-ML-001.title: Market Linkage net-revenue needs a priced Product (data dependency)
PR-TC-FW-ML-001.actual: Sales Tracker table (Channel/Product/SKU/Month/Year/Units/Revenue) renders and rows add cleanly, but there is NO Selling Price column — Revenue derives from the linked Product's price. Product search returns no options for an EP without a provisioned Product Profile, so Revenue stays '—' and net-revenue-with-commission cannot be exercised. Verifying this calc requires an entrepreneur with priced products + a channel commission mapping (Required tab). Not a single-form drive.

PR-TC-FW-PROMO-001.title: Cost-per-reach metric not implemented
PR-TC-FW-PROMO-001.actual: DF Promotion Entry (existing_promotions / required_promotions child) has NO budget, reach, or cost numeric fields — so the spec's cost-per-reach = budget/reach metric is not captured anywhere in the promotions table. Confirm whether cost-per-reach is required; if so it is missing.

PR-TC-FW-PROTO-001.actual: Conditional Prototype-Type dropdown is 3 levels deep: product -> + Add Iteration -> type/conditional fields. Deep-nested — deferred. (Form has dedicated PROTOTYPES tab + LOG BOOK.)

PR-TC-FW-TEST-001.title: Test date-chain (Sent<=Received<=Reported) not validated
PR-TC-FW-TEST-001.actual: UI form-fill: set Date of Sample Deposit to Office = 2026-06-15 and to Lab = 2026-06-01 (lab BEFORE office, out of order). NO date-order validation/warning fired (live). Spec expects rejection (Received must be on/after Sent). Confirm save-time enforcement.

PR-TC-FW-STD-001.actual: SOP upload + status (Drafted/Reviewed/Approved) + versioning is file-upload-driven (P2) — needs a file fixture; deferred. (Form has LOG BOOK tab — consistent.)

PR-TC-FW-QC-001.title: QC scoring model differs from BRD (23-star/115)
PR-TC-FW-QC-001.actual: QC EXISTING uses an "+ Add Item" checklist with a 4-LEVEL rating (0/33/66/100) and AVERAGE SCORE (%), NOT the BRD spec of 23 fixed stars totalling /115 (e.g. 92/115=80%). Items are manually added (not pre-loaded). Confirm whether 23 standard items should pre-load + whether the scoring model should match spec.

PR-TC-FW-PKG-001.title: Packaging saving_per_unit does not compute
PR-TC-FW-PKG-001.actual: API insert+readback: monthly order cost = quantity_ordered × price_per_unit = 100 × ₹5 = ₹500.00 (CORRECT ✓). BUT packaging_info saving_per_unit returned 0.0 with price_per_unit ₹10 + new_price_per_unit ₹8 (expected ₹2 old−new saving) — did not compute. Confirm the saving formula / required trigger fields.

PR-TC-FW-DL-001.actual: UI form-fill: added 1 skill rated level 5 -> SKILLS RATED 1, AVG SKILL LEVEL 5.0 (aggregation correct). Readiness = avg x 20 = 100%; the % display likely on summary (avg computed correctly).

PR-TC-FW-SCH-001.title: Schemes EMI uses reducing-balance amortization, not BRD flat model
PR-TC-FW-SCH-001.actual: API insert+readback (Loan ₹1,00,000, 12% p.a., 12 months): emi_per_month computed = ₹8,884.88 — exact match for reducing-balance amortization EMI = P·r·(1+r)^n/((1+r)^n−1). Does NOT match BRD FW-SCH-001 flat Loan/Term (₹5,555.56) nor flat+simple-interest (₹9,333.33). EMI is a SAVE-TIME computed field ('— save to compute —' in-form). Implemented amortization is financially correct but deviates from spec — BA to confirm intended formula (likely update BRD).

PR-TC-FW-PC-001.actual: UI: + Add Registration/License row captures Issuing Authority, Valid Till date / Lifetime Validity, and a Status (Received/Not Yet Received/Rejected). Cert entry works. NOTE: file upload + 60/30/7-day expiry warning not surfaced/verified.

PR-TC-FW-PC-002.title: Product Compliance cert has no Active/Expired status; expiry not flagged
PR-TC-FW-PC-002.actual: Cert Status field = Received/Not Yet Received/Rejected (+ validity date), NOT an Active/Expired status — so the spec premise "cannot mark an expired cert Active" does not map. Setting a PAST Valid Till date (2025-01-01) showed NO expiry warning/flag. Confirm: should expired certs be flagged/blocked?

PR-TC-FW-UP-003.title: Unit Pricing tab structure inconsistent (TASKS tab, no Log Book)
PR-TC-FW-UP-003.actual: Unit Pricing form tabs = DETAILS/EXISTING/REQUIRED/LINE ITEMS/TASKS/RESOURCES — it has a TASKS tab and NO LOG BOOK, unlike the other 26 frameworks (which show LOG BOOK). Contradicts the BRD decision: Task tab removed from framework forms; Log Book remains.
